## Manfuacturers

### Create manufacturers

#### Using curl

```bash
# Create with autogenerated id
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers -d '{"name":"Test Auto 1"}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers -d '{"name":"Test Auto 2"}'
$ curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/manufacturers -d '{"name":"Test Auto 3"}'

# Create with custom id
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1 -d '{"name":"Test 1"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/2 -d '{"name":"Test 2"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/3 -d '{"name":"Test 3"}'
```

### Update manufacturers

#### Using curl

```bash
# Update
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/{id} -d '{"name":"Test Auto 1 Up"}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/{id} -d '{"siret":2}'
$ curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/{id} -d '{"name":"Test Auto 3 Up","phone":"+33610203040"}'

# Replace
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1 -d '{"name":"Test 1 Up"}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/2 -d '{"siret":12}'
$ curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/3 -d '{"name":"Test 3 Up","phone":"+33650607080"}'
```

### Retrieve manufacturers

#### Using curl

```bash
# All
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/manufacturers

# One
$ curl -X GET http://localhost:3000/manufacturers/1
```
